creator: root@terrorist.com
text:
i've tryed to compile scrollkeeper using the lastest version of the ports
tree, but it gives me an error like preinstall.c: In function
update_doc_url_in_omf_file':
preinstall.c:47: structure has no member named childs'
preinstall.c: In function main':
preinstall.c:82: structure has no member named root'
gmake[3]: *** [preinstall.o] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory
/usr/ports/textproc/scrollkeeper/work/scrollkeeper-0.2/cl/src'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory
/usr/ports/textproc/scrollkeeper/work/scrollkeeper-0.2/cl'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory
/usr/ports/textproc/scrollkeeper/work/scrollkeeper-0.2'
gmake: *** [all-recursive-am] Error 2
